use_cases: Primary action buttons in application headers and navigation bars
Dropdown menu triggers with customizable styling variants
Secondary action buttons in forms and toolbars
Outline-style buttons for less prominent actions
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
ai_summary: A versatile menu button component with multiple visual variants including primary, outline, ghost, and destructive styles. Built on base-ui-components with CVA for consistent theming, featuring standard hover, focus, and open states. Suitable for dropdown triggers, navigation menus, and action buttons in SaaS and general web applications.
